name: di-promptu-biblioteka
description: DI Promptų Biblioteka – statinė HTML platforma

scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/structure.test.js && node tests/design-system-smoke.test.js && node tests/a11y-smoke.test.js && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:js
scripts.lint:html: npx html-validate index.html lt/index.html lt/privatumas.html en/index.html en/privacy.html
